flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Tennessee Technological University rose 16% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.8k → $11.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Tennessee Technological University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Tennessee Technological University fell 21% between 2021 and 2024 ($19.8k → $15.6k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Tennessee Technological University fell 11% between 2017 and 2020 ($17.6k → $15.7k).
